stemHtml: What is the main cause of conductive deafness?

options.a: Prolonged exposure to high-frequency sounds, such as turbine-engine noise.
options.b: An infectious disease of the inner ear that affects, for example, balance and hearing.
options.c: A combination of lifestyle, e.g. smoking, and environmental factors, e.g. stress.
options.d: A blockage of the outer or middle ear, e.g. ear wax, or fluid in the middle ear.
